title: ICMR Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Consultant Posts
description: The Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of Consultant Jobs. Candidates with a B.E./ B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering or Electrical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for these posts. Here we mentioned more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for the ICMR Notification 2026 . Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date....
